_note: Phase 5 Track B, Stage 1: SFT a libero_10 (LIBERO-Long) SPECIALIST as the demo-seed remedy for the Phase-4 sec-8 starvation (results/rl_libero10_probe.json: goal-only pi_0 = 0/10 zero-shot on libero_10 -> filtered BC starves). lerobot/smolvla_base fine-tuned on the 379 libero_10 episodes, then evaluated on libero_10 n=100. This pi_0^L10 is the RL base + vf-anchor reference for Stage-3 RL (pinned immutable at Drive VLATune/rl/rl_base_l10/).
headline: DEMO-SEED WORKED: SFT lifts libero_10 from ~0% (goal-only zero-shot) to 50.0% (n=100). The sec-8 eval gate (>=~30%) is PASSED, so filtered/reward-weighted BC will NOT starve on libero_10 -> Stage-3 RL can bootstrap.
method: Supervised fine-tuning (behavior cloning) of lerobot/smolvla_base on the 379 libero_10 episodes of HuggingFaceVLA/libero (filtered via in-row episode_index; broken-file-index workaround = full data+meta download). Identical recipe to the Phase-3 goal SFT, swapping the suite. Eval = per-task single-process lerobot-eval subprocesses (the multi-task EGL-teardown crash is thereby avoided).

policies.pi_0_L10: smolvla_sft_l10_run1/checkpoints/last @ step 20000; pinned -> rl/rl_base_l10/pretrained_model. Fine-tuned FROM lerobot/smolvla_base (NOT the goal SFT rl_base_16k -- starting from the goal SFT would fold a Goal-pretraining-transfer confound into the libero_10 result; smolvla_base keeps it the clean analog of the Goal SFT).

dataset.note: textbook 50x10=500; processing drops it to 379 (cf. Goal's 428). ~45 frames/episode -- modest for long-horizon (this processed dataset is decimated). Episode list: results/dataset_l10_episodes.json (to be committed).

eval_protocol.hardware: Colab Pro+ A100 (ran on A100 for unattended autonomy; eval is sim/CPU-bound, so this is a deliberate units-over-frugality call -- L4 is the cheaper hardware match)

interpretation: The sec-8 demo-seed remedy works: a libero_10-specialist SFT reaches 50% (just below the lower edge of the ~52-71% literature band -- reasonable for 379 eps / 20k steps), vs ~0% for the goal-only policy. This removes the filtered-BC starvation that blocked Phase-4 RL on libero_10. The per-task spread (weak: t4=10, t0=20, t8=20, t7=30; strong: t1/t2/t5=70-80) is the headroom map for Stage-3 RL -- the weak tasks are where a measurable RL effect would show.
confounds: n=10/task -> per-task numbers are noisy (binomial CI ~+/-25 pts at n=10); the overall n=100 (~+/-7-10) is the reliable figure.

16992 frames (~45/episode) is modest for long-horizon; ~75 epochs invites overfitting -- but the policy generalized to 50% on fresh initial states (loss plateaued ~0.03, did not crash toward 0), so the last (20k) checkpoint was kept as the anchor (an earlier checkpoint was on standby had it underperformed).
Eval ran on A100 (sim-bound; a deliberate units-over-frugality call for unattended autonomy).
SFT from smolvla_base, not rl_base_16k -- intentional (clean analog of the Goal SFT; avoids a Goal-transfer confound).
next: Stage-3 RL on libero_10: rollout->filter(+time-to-success weight)->reward-weighted BC with vf-beta anchor to the frozen pi_0^L10; collection==eval per-task. Measure whether libero_10 success rises DURABLY across iterations or redistributes within noise (the Goal pattern). Scoped (rollouts/task, iters, seeds) to the budget given libero_10's slow render (~2 min/episode); claim-grade where a signal appears.
